summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new gamification features: Daily Streak System, Mistake Review System, and Achievement Badges. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all gamification cards and modals are working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/children/{id}/streak - returns streak data with current_streak, longest_streak, last_practice_date, streak_history
Streak increments on progress update via PUT /api/children/{id}/progress
Streak history contains valid ISO date strings
GET /api/children/{id}/mistakes - returns mistakes with total_count and unreviewed_count
POST /api/children/{id}/mistakes - records wrong answers correctly
Correct answers are NOT recorded as mistakes (is_correct: true)
PUT /api/children/{id}/mistakes/{id}/review - marks mistake as reviewed
DELETE /api/children/{id}/mistakes/{id} - deletes mistake from review list
GET /api/children/{id}/achievements - returns earned and locked badges with metadata
Earned badges have proper metadata (id, name, icon, description, category, earned_at)
Locked badges have proper metadata with earned=false
first_star badge is earned after getting 1+ stars
Badge categories are valid (stars, streaks, special)
Progress update returns streak data in response
Child data includes streak information
Child data includes achievements array
Daily Streak card displays on LearnPage with 7-day calendar visualization
Compact streak display shows in header with fire emoji
Mistake Review card shows unreviewed count badge
Mistake Review Modal opens and shows previous mistakes with retry options
Achievements Modal shows earned (1) and locked (12) badges with progress bar
GameModule records mistakes when user answers incorrectly
seed_data_creation: Johnny has 3 stars, 1 day streak, 2 mistakes recorded, and first_star badge earned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gamification features fully tested and working. Johnny (child ID 7bd2c732-3b27-45be-add2-51c813440404) has: 3 total stars, 1 day current streak, 2 mistakes to review, first_star badge earned. All API endpoints working: /api/children/{id}/streak, /api/children/{id}/mistakes, /api/children/{id}/achievements. Frontend components: StreakDisplay (compact and full), MistakeReviewModal, AchievementBadgesModal all functional.

daily_streak_system.streak_display_header: Working - shows fire emoji with count
daily_streak_system.streak_card: Working - shows current/best streak and 7-day calendar
daily_streak_system.streak_history: Working - stores last 30 days of practice dates

mistake_review_system.mistake_recording: Working - records wrong answers in GameModule
mistake_review_system.mistake_display: Working - shows unreviewed count on card
mistake_review_system.mistake_modal: Working - shows questions with previous answer and retry options
mistake_review_system.mistake_delete: Working - can remove from review list

achievement_badges.badge_display: Working - shows earned and locked badges
achievement_badges.total_badges: 13 badges available (1 earned, 12 locked for Johnny)
